name: AWP | 灵缇
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been custom painted with the LongDog graffiti from Train. \"The greatest dog to have ever lived is the one waiting for you at home\"
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 它采用了列车停放站里楼梯间处的涂鸦进行定制涂装。 “世界上最棒的狗狗，正在家中等你归来”
